title: How Codex and Anydocs Work Together
description: Put Codex inside an MCP-driven docs workflow.

render.markdown:
# How Codex and Anydocs Work Together

In Anydocs, Codex works best when it:

- reads the project contract first
- inspects current page state
- uses `page_create` or `page_update` for explicit changes
- uses `page_set_status` as a separate workflow action

The main idea is not to have Codex edit `pages/*.json` directly, but to keep it on MCP tools.
